name: Kamphaeng Phet Akarayothin Golf Course
source_notes: PROBABLE MIL SKIP. 'Akarayothin' (อักษรยุทธ) is a Thai military designation — Kamphaeng Phet province hosts a large Royal Thai Army Infantry Center (ศูนย์การทหารราบ ค่ายวชิรปราการ, Wachira Prakarn Camp). The course name strongly suggests this is the army camp golf course, not a civilian-open facility. No civilian access data found. No green fees, phone, or website found in any public source.
skip_reason: MIL — probable army camp course (Akarayothin = military designation; Kamphaeng Phet has Royal Thai Army Infantry Center)
